title: The CISO Masterclass
description:
This course features Coursera Coach!

A smarter way to learn with interactive, real-time conversations that help you test your knowledge, challenge assumptions, and deepen your understanding as you progress through the course.

The CISO Masterclass is designed for aspiring CISOs, security leaders, and those interested in understanding the journey to the CISO role. By the end of the course, you will have a clear understanding of the essential personality traits of a CISO, be able to develop a comprehensive 90-day plan that includes people, processes, technology, and budgeting, and know how to create a robust cybersecurity strategy. You will also gain the skills to evaluate security metrics and tackle challenges such as budget constraints and team management, preparing you for real-world CISO responsibilities.

As you progress, you’ll embark on a step-by-step journey that starts with career reflections and progresses through the essential 90-day plan for a CISO. This plan focuses on people, processes, technology, and budgeting, ensuring you are well-prepared for real-world CISO challenges. Additionally, the course covers the crucial aspects of cybersecurity strategy and metrics, helping you to assess and improve the effectiveness of your security posture.

This course is ideal for those seeking to understand the CISO position, from role responsibilities to leadership strategies. A foundational understanding of information security principles and a keen interest in advancing into cybersecurity leadership are recommended.
